statements.title: Pekela must again organise a Volunteer Day.
The property tax (ozb) must be raised if the municipality runs short of money.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

titleParts.text: (ozb) moet omhoog als de gemeente geld tekort komt.

statements.title: The municipality must give companies money if they employ a resident of Pekela.
Pekela must do more to prevent water problems caused by extreme downpours.

titleParts.glossary: Damage or nuisance caused by excess water, for example during heavy rain.

statements.title: The residents of Pekela must be able to give their opinion at least once a year on an important issue in a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Pekela moeten minstens één keer per jaar hun mening kunnen geven over een belangrijk onderwerp in een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: The municipality must counter the use of pesticides in agriculture.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet het gebruik van

titleParts.glossary: Substances used to control weeds, insects or diseases.

statements.title: The municipality must make public spaces more female-friendly.

titleParts.glossary: Outdoor areas that are accessible to everyone, such as streets, squares, and parks.

statements.title: Entrepreneurs should be given more freedom in making advertising on or near their business.
The municipality of Pekela must be energy neutral by 2040 at the latest.

titleParts.text: De gemeente Pekela moet uiterlijk in 2040

titleParts.glossary: An energy-neutral municipality generates as much clean energy as all its residents and businesses together consume. A building or area can also be energy-neutral.

statements.title: The municipality must make it easier for people with dementia to find their way on the street.
The municipality should handle more itself and participate less in partnerships with other municipalities.
The municipality should ban new solar panels on agricultural land.
The municipality must continue to give refugees with a residence permit priority for social housing.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet vluchtelingen met een

titleParts.glossary: The right to reside in the Netherlands. The term can refer to the right itself or to the card that shows someone has that right.
A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: The municipality must stop doing business with employers who cause young people without a diploma to quit their education.
More municipal enforcement officers (boa’s) who deal with safety should be deployed in Pekela.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: The municipality must ensure that every child receives healthy meals at school.
People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: The municipality must itself carry out the construction of social rental housing and alternative housing forms.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de bouw van

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: en en alternatieve woonvormen zelf gaan uitvoeren.

statements.title: First-time homebuyers should be able to receive a starter loan from the municipality.

titleParts.text: Mensen die voor het eerst een huis willen kopen, moeten van de gemeente een

titleParts.glossary: An extra loan on top of your mortgage, which you can only get when buying a house for the first time.

statements.title: The municipality must ask the police to check speed limits more often.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de politie vragen om vaker te controleren op de

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.

statements.title: The municipality must spend more money on road maintenance.
The municipality should designate more parking spaces as charging points for electric cars.
New houses on the Heeresmeer may be built right on the water, even if that interrupts a walking path.
If a wolf causes problems, the municipality may have it shot.
The municipality must ensure there is a playground for children with disabilities.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet zorgen dat er een speeltuin is voor kinderen met een

titleParts.glossary: Something that limits you in daily life. A disability can be physical or intellectual or relate to hearing or sight, or combinations of these.

statements.title: The municipality must ensure that the Zuidkantklap is preserved.
Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: Village hall De Kiepe must be preserved.
The municipality must investigate whether school swimming can be reintroduced in Pekela.

titleParts.glossary: Swimming lessons organized by the school.

statements.title: As many people with lived experience as possible should work in youth care.

titleParts.text: Er moeten zoveel mogelijk ervaringsdeskundigen werken in de

titleParts.glossary: Support for young people with problems, for example mental health care, foster care, day programmes, and help with dyslexia.

shootoutStatements.title: If sports clubs are struggling, the municipality should contribute financially.
The municipal council should continue to meet in the town hall, even after the renovation.
Pekela should ensure that it becomes easier for entrepreneurs to do business across the border with Germany.
The municipality should allow the installation of a wind turbine if a village has its own plan for it.
Pekela should give priority to small and local businesses for municipal contracts.
The municipality should prevent agricultural land in Pekela from being converted into nature reserves.
If the municipality needs new vehicles, they should run on biogas, biodiesel, hydrogen or green electricity.
Vacant commercial buildings should be converted into housing using municipal funds.
The regulatory burden on businesses should be reduced in Pekela.
Many more subsidized jobs for the long‑term unemployed must be created in our municipality.
The municipality should attract more manufacturing industry to Pekela.
Basic livelihood security takes precedence over sustainability when the municipality has to make choices.
People receiving welfare benefits who provide informal care to a family member or acquaintance do not have to apply for jobs.
The municipality should spend more money on integrating newcomers into society.
The municipality should mow public grass more often.
The municipality should provide residents with information about healthy eating.
Village community center De Kiepe should relocate to make way for housing.
Bulky waste should always be collected from homes free of charge.
The municipality should start a campaign to reduce polarization in society.
The municipality should build a separate cycle path between Boven Pekela and Stadskanaal.
The municipality must not give anyone priority for social housing.
